ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "district_code" TEXT /* Code for the district */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province the district belongs to */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the district belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polling_stations" (
  "polling_station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each polling station */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the polling station belongs to */,
  "poll_number" TEXT /* Poll number of the polling station */,
  "poll_name" TEXT /* Name of the polling station */,
  "poll_address" TEXT /* Address of the polling station */,
  "geographic_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the polling station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("polling_station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_stations_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "incumbent" INTEGER /* Whether the candidate is an incumbent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "polling_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polling station the result belongs to */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of votes received by the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_polling_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("polling_station_id") REFERENCES polling_stations ("polling_station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rejected_ballots" (
  "rejected_ballot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rejected ballot record */,
  "polling_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polling station the record belongs to */,
  "number_of_ballots" INTEGER /* Number of rejected ballots */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejection (e.g., invalid signature, incomplete information) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rejected_ballot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rejected_ballots_polling_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("polling_station_id") REFERENCES polling_stations ("polling_station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_votes" (
  "total_vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each total vote record */,
  "polling_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polling station the record belongs to */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast */,
  "turnout_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of voter turnout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_votes_polling_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("polling_station_id") REFERENCES polling_stations ("polling_station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electors" (
  "elector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each elector record */,
  "polling_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polling station the record belongs to */,
  "number_of_electors" INTEGER /* Number of electors */,
  "eligible_voters" INTEGER /* Number of eligible voters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("elector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electors_polling_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("polling_station_id") REFERENCES polling_stations ("polling_station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the results */,
  "polling_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polling station being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the results were accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_polling_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("polling_station_id") REFERENCES polling_stations ("polling_station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_metadata" (
  "election_metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election metadata record */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., federal, provincial, municipal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_metadata_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "polling_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polling station the version belongs to */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result the version belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_polling_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("polling_station_id") REFERENCES polling_stations ("polling_station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
